---defines---
NORMAL_MAP_ENABLE=1
---source---
#art NORMAL_MAP_ENABLE "法线贴图开关" "BOOL"
#ifndef NORMAL_MAP_ENABLE
#define NORMAL_MAP_ENABLE 0
#endif
#if NORMAL_MAP_ENABLE
int has_normal;
#else
int no_normal;
#endif
---expected_line_active---
true, true, false, true, true, true, true, false, true
---expected_branch_count---
2
